title: MATLAB Vectorization Example
summary: This page demonstrates an efficient matrix-based approach in MATLAB to simultaneously compute and plot 11 curves of a damped sinusoidal function hα(t) for α = 0 to 10. It introduces the concept of vectorization, using outer products and diagonal matrices to avoid repetitive individual computations. The resulting 201×11 matrix H is plotted using MATLAB's plot command with matrix arguments.
